docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-22-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: (DENYING PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER GRANTING MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS (BY RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES)

PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION FILED BY PETITIONER ARIAS, LOUIE AS TO RESPONDENT VALVERDE, GEORGE IN HIS CAPACITY AS THE DIRECTOR OF THE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OF THE BUSINESS TRANSPORTATION AND HOUSING AGENCY OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES HEARING SET FOR MAR-22-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES' MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. MOVING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF DRIVING SUSPENSION; MEMORANDUM OF P/A; DECLARATION OF LOUIE ARIAS AND LEE A. MCCOY, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PETITIONER ARIAS, LOUIE
